name: Mercenaries
background: The Guilds of the Nexus are various factions of violent and deranged outlaws that wage eternal guild wars on the streets of the Nexus. These guilds are joined by mercenaries which are not bound to any particular guild, and which fight for anyone that can provide riches or a worthy cause.

sections.label: Replace Heavy Throwing Weapon and Hand Weapon

options.label: Heavy Throwing Weapon (12", A1, AP(1)), Dagger (A2)

sections.label: Replace Throwing Weapon and Hand Weapon

spells.name: Aura of Heroism
spells.effect: Pick one friendly unit within 12", which gets +1 to morale test rolls once (next time the effect would apply).

parameters.name: effectDuration
parameters.value: once (next time the effect would apply)

costFormula.value: params.thisUnit ? this.getMoraleCost({ ...unit, quality: Math.max(1, unit.quality - params.effect.rollModifier.value) }) - this.getMoraleCost(unit) : 0

effectDuration.name: once (next time the effect would apply)

costFormula.value: params.thisUnit ? 0 : this.getMoraleCost({ quality: 5 - params.effect.rollModifier.value }) - this.getMoraleCost({ quality: 5 })

effectDuration.name: once (next time the effect would apply)

spells.effectSkirmish: Pick one friendly unit within 12", which gets +1 to morale test rolls once (next time the effect would apply).

spells.name: Fire Ball
spells.effect: Pick one enemy unit within 12", which takes 2 hits with AP(1) and Surge. Roll as many dice as hits to see if "on rolls of 6" effects trigger.

parameters.name: spellHitRoll
parameters.value: Roll as many dice as hits to see if "on rolls of 6" effects trigger.

spellHitRoll.name: Roll as many dice as hits to see if "on rolls of 6" effects trigger.

spells.effectSkirmish: Pick one enemy unit within 12", which takes 2 hits with AP(1) and Surge. Roll as many dice as hits to see if "on rolls of 6" effects trigger.

spells.name: Magic Targeting
spells.effect: Pick up to two enemy units within 18", which friendly units get +1 to hit rolls in melee against once (next time the effect would apply).

parameters.name: effectDuration
parameters.value: once (next time the effect would apply)

costFormula.value:
var range = params.effect.attackType?.value ?? 24;
return (this.getWeaponCost({ attacks: 1.5, range }, { quality: 5 - params.effect.rollModifier.value }) - this.getWeaponCost({ attacks: 1.5, range }, { quality: 5 }))

effectDuration.name: once (next time the effect would apply)

spells.effectSkirmish: Pick up to two enemy units within 18", which friendly units get +1 to hit rolls in melee against once (next time the effect would apply).

spells.name: Blood Hex
spells.effect: Pick up to two enemy units within 12", which takes 3 hits.
spells.effectSkirmish: Pick up to two enemy units within 12", which takes 3 hits.

spells.name: Elemental Form
spells.effect: Pick up to three friendly units within 12", which get AP(+1) in melee once (next time the effect would apply).

parameters.name: effectDuration
parameters.value: once (next time the effect would apply)

effectDuration.name: once (next time the effect would apply)
once (next time the effect would apply)

spells.effectSkirmish: Pick up to three friendly units within 12", which get AP(+1) in melee once (next time the effect would apply).

spells.name: Spirit Leech
spells.effect: Pick up to three enemy models within 18", which takes 2 hits with AP(1).
spells.effectSkirmish: Pick up to three enemy models within 18", which takes 2 hits with AP(1).

specialRules.name: Repel Ambushers
specialRules.description: Enemy units using Ambush must be set up over 12" away from this model's unit.

specialRules.name: Piercing Hunter Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get Piercing Hunter. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Battle-Hardened
specialRules.description: Units where all models have this rule get +1 to morale test rolls.

specialRules.name: Piercing Assault Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get Piercing Assault. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Increased Shooting Range Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get +6" range when shooting. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Regeneration Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get Regeneration. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Ambush
specialRules.description: Only deploys D3 rounds afters its wave is deployed, and at the start of the round it's placed at the centre of a random table quarter.

specialRules.name: Piercing Hunter
specialRules.description: This model gets AP(+1) when shooting enemies over 9" away.

specialRules.name: Piercing Assault
specialRules.description: This model gets AP(+1) when charging.

specialRules.name: Regeneration
specialRules.description: When a unit where all models have this rule takes wounds, roll one die for each. On a 5+ it is ignored.

specialRules.name: AP
specialRules.description: Targets get -X to Defense rolls when blocking hits.

specialRules.name: Surge
specialRules.description: On unmodified results of 6 to hit, this weapon deals 1 extra hits (only the original hit counts as a 6 for special rules).
